title: Senior/Machine Control Software Engineer (semicon/mfg)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Design, develop, and implement robust machine control software for complex manufacturing equipment

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate software solutions with hardware components

  • Troubleshoot and resolve software-related issues in production environments

  • Continuously optimize and enhance existing software systems to improve performance and reliability

  • Document code, processes, and procedures to ensure maintainability and traceability

  • Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in machine control software engineering


What we're looking for

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in machine control software development, preferably in the semiconductor or manufacturing sectors

  • Proficiency in programming languages such as C++, C#, Python, and PLC programming

  • Strong understanding of real-time embedded systems, control theory, and industrial automation protocols

  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills to identify and resolve complex software issues

  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and communicate effectively with cross-functional stakeholders

  • Familiarity with software development best practices, including version control, testing, and documentation


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg
